nasb.text: therefore thus says the Lord God, ‘Behold, I am against you, O Tyre, and I will bring up many nations against you, as the sea brings up its waves.

esv.text: therefore thus says the Lord God: Behold, I am against you, O Tyre, and will bring up many nations against you, as the sea brings up its waves.

cnv.text: 所以主耶和華這樣說：‘推羅啊！我要與你為敵；我必叫多國上來攻擊你，好像海使波浪湧上來一樣。

ccb.text: 所以主耶和华说，‘泰尔啊，我要跟你作对，我要激起多国来攻击你，就像大海掀起波浪一样。
